items.title: Six of Sarah Ferguson's companies winding down
items.description: The move follows further revelations over her friendship with the convicted paedophile Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: Australian IS families in Syria camp turned back after leaving for home
items.description: The group of 34 women and children with family links to Islamic State group have been held in the Roj camp for nearly seven years.

items.title: Disability and LGBT hate crimes set to become aggravated offences
items.description: The proposed change has been set out in an amendment to the government's Crimes and Policing Bill.

items.title: League One Mansfield to host Arsenal in fifth round - full FA Cup draw
items.description: League One club Mansfield will host record 14-time winners Arsenal at Field Mill in the FA Cup fifth round, as Manchester City head to Newcastle in a ...

items.title: Actor Robert Duvall, who starred in The Godfather, dies aged 95
items.description: The Oscar-winner died "peacefully" at his home in Middleburg, Virginia, on Sunday, his family says.
